steps.title: Find where the function equals zero
steps.content:
The x-intercept occurs where the graph crosses the x-axis, which happens when $y = 0$. Setting $f(x) = 0$:
$$6x - 90 = 0$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Add 90 to both sides and divide by 6:
$$6x = 90$$
$$x = 15$$
So the x-intercept is at $(15, 0)$. That matches the correct answer - D is correct.
